feedback_fields.description: Whether the user actually followed the recommended path.
feedback_fields.label: Followed Path

feedback_fields.description: One of win, loss, breakeven, invalidated, abandoned, or not_followed.
feedback_fields.label: Realized Outcome

feedback_fields.description: Optional realized PnL from the actual execution.
feedback_fields.label: Realized PnL

feedback_fields.description: Freeform reason such as stop_hit, target_hit, invalidated, timed_out.
feedback_fields.label: Exit Reason

feedback_fields.description: Optional operator notes about what actually happened.
feedback_fields.label: Notes

notes: Preserve recommendation_id plus node/branch/scenario/path ids when recording live feedback.
This is a protocol contract only; canonical persistence wiring comes next.

execution_contract.confirmation: recommended command remains valid on next refresh
execution_contract.invalidation: Required market data or state inputs stay missing.
execution_contract.stop: No trade until preconditions are satisfied.
